eras.description: Post-revolutionary reaction, Napoleonic Wars, industrial revolution begins. Landed aristocracy rules.
Great Reform Act, Chartism, repeal of Corn Laws. Gradual democratization and free trade.
Global empire at zenith. Free trade, industrial supremacy, moral reform, limited franchise expansion.
New imperialism, Irish question, Labour movement rises, welfare state beginnings.
Total war, Irish independence, women's suffrage, post-war settlement.
General Strike, Great Depression, appeasement. Decline of empire begins.
Blitz, total mobilization, Beveridge Report. Coalition government, wartime solidarity.
NHS, welfare state, nationalization, decolonization. Broad bipartisan social-democratic consensus.
Decolonization complete, EEC entry, industrial decline, social liberalization, troubles in Northern Ireland.
Privatization, deregulation, miners' strike, Falklands. Neoliberal revolution dismantles postwar consensus.
Third Way, devolution, Good Friday Agreement, Iraq War. Market-friendly social democracy.
Financial crisis austerity, Scottish referendum, Brexit, culture wars, institutional strain.
Final years of absolute monarchy. Estates-General convened, revolution imminent.
Radical republic, Terror, Directory. Universal ideals of liberty, equality, fraternity amid violent upheaval.
Authoritarian modernizer. Civil Code, meritocracy, continental hegemony, military genius.
Bourbon return, constitutional charter, ultraroyalist reaction, liberal opposition grows.
Citizen King, bourgeois liberalism, industrialization begins, colonial expansion in Algeria.
Brief democratic experiment, universal male suffrage, quickly overthrown by Louis-Napoleon.
Napoleon III's authoritarian modernization, Haussmann's Paris, colonial expansion, Franco-Prussian defeat.
Republic consolidates after Commune. Dreyfus Affair, secularism (laïcité), colonial expansion.
WWI victory, interwar instability, Popular Front, appeasement, fall to Germany.
Collaborationist authoritarian regime under German occupation. National Revolution ideology.
Unstable parliamentary democracy, decolonization wars, Marshall Plan recovery, European integration begins.
Strong presidency, nuclear deterrent, independent foreign policy, dirigiste economy.
Alternation left-right, EU integration, immigration debates, terrorism, Yellow Vests.
Post-Jena reforms, liberation wars against Napoleon, bureaucratic modernization.
Metternich system, Biedermeier culture, censorship, industrialization begins.
Frankfurt Parliament, liberal-national revolution fails. "Revolution from below" defeated.
Unification by "blood and iron," Kulturkampf, anti-socialist laws, welfare state pioneered.
Weltpolitik, naval race, industrial powerhouse, militarism, social tensions.
Total war, Hindenburg Program, revolution, armistice. Military dictatorship in all but name.
Fragile democracy, hyperinflation, golden twenties, Depression, rise of extremism.
Totalitarian dictatorship, racial state, Holocaust, WWII, total destruction.
Four-zone occupation, denazification, Berlin Blockade, currency reform.
Economic miracle, NATO, EU founding, social market economy, Ostpolitik.
Soviet satellite, Berlin Wall, Stasi surveillance, planned economy.
Reunification challenges, EU leadership, refugee crisis, energy transition, Ukraine response.
Enlightened absolutism, Napoleonic Wars victory, Holy Alliance. Serfdom persists.
Reactionary autocracy, Decembrist suppression, "Orthodoxy, Autocracy, Nationality," Crimean defeat.
Emancipation of serfs, judicial reform, zemstvos. Modernization from above while maintaining autocracy.
Pogroms, Russification, industrialization, revolutionary movements grow, Russo-Japanese defeat.
1905 revolution, Duma, WWI, February and October Revolutions. End of 300 years of Romanov rule.
War Communism, NEP, Comintern. Revolutionary state consolidates through civil war and famine.
Collectivization, industrialization, Great Purge, WWII victory. Totalitarian terror and superpower emergence.
De-Stalinization, space race, Cuban Missile Crisis, "peaceful coexistence." Cultural loosening.
Détente, arms race, economic stagnation, gerontocracy. Military superpower with sclerotic economy.
Glasnost, perestroika, democratization, Eastern bloc falls, USSR dissolves.
Shock therapy, oligarchs, Chechen wars, constitutional crisis, economic collapse.
Centralized power, resource nationalism, Crimea annexation, Ukraine war. Managed democracy to authoritarianism.
Years of Lead period of Italy.
Craxi/First Republic End period of Italy.
Habsburg Enlightened Absolutism period of Austria/Austria-Hungary.
Austria-Hungary Dual Monarchy period of Austria/Austria-Hungary.
Second Republic Consensus period of Austria/Austria-Hungary.
Late Ottoman period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Hamidian Era period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Young Turks/WWI period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Kemalist Republic period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Multi-party Turkey period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Coup/Instability Era period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Ozal/Secular Republic period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
Erdogan Era period of Ottoman Empire/Turkey.
United Kingdom of Netherlands period of Netherlands.
Liberal Reform Era period of Sweden.
Social Democratic Rise period of Sweden.
Cold War Greece period of Greece.
Magic Formula Era period of Switzerland.
Post-revolutionary republic under Washington and Adams. Strong central government, commercial economy, British alignment.
Democratic-Republican dominance. Agrarian vision, westward expansion, limited government, Louisiana Purchase.
Mass democracy, spoils system, Indian removal, Bank War. Common man populism with racist exclusion.
Slavery debate dominates. Compromise of 1850, Kansas-Nebraska, Dred Scott. Union fracturing.
Civil War, abolition, Reconstruction amendments. Brief experiment in multiracial democracy before white supremacist backlash.
Industrial capitalism, robber barons, weak government, high tariffs, gold standard. Massive inequality and immigration.
Trust-busting, labor regulation, women's suffrage, Prohibition. Government as reformer. WWI entry.
Return to isolationism, business-friendly government, cultural modernization, Prohibition enforcement.
FDR's social safety net, labor rights, WWII mobilization. Birth of the welfare state and American superpower.
Bipartisan anti-communism, civil rights movement, suburban growth, Great Society, Space Race.
Vietnam, Watergate, stagflation, Iran hostage crisis. Trust in institutions collapses. Southern strategy realigns parties.
Neoliberal consensus: deregulation, free trade, welfare reform. Culture wars begin. End of Cold War to War on Terror.
Extreme partisan polarization, social media, populist movements left and right, institutional distrust, identity politics.
First Empire/Early Republic period of Mexico.
British North America period of Canada.
Quiet Revolution/Trudeau Sr. period of Canada.
Liberal Republic/La Violencia period of Colombia.
Late Castro/Special Period period of Cuba.
Punto Fijo Democracy period of Venezuela.
Qing peak and early decline. Population pressure, corruption, Canton system trade.
Western forced opening, unequal treaties, Taiping Rebellion kills 20M+. Dynasty near-collapse.
Modernization attempts, Sino-Japanese War defeat, Hundred Days Reform, Boxer Rebellion.
End of 2,000 years of empire. Warlord fragmentation, May Fourth Movement, KMT-CPC founded.
KMT consolidation, modernization, Japanese invasion, civil war with Communists.
Land reform, Korean War, Hundred Flowers. Revolutionary transformation of society.
Great Leap Forward (famine kills 30M+), Cultural Revolution, personality cult, isolation.
Market reforms, SEZs, Tiananmen Square massacre. "Socialism with Chinese characteristics."
WTO entry, economic boom, technocratic governance, harmonious society rhetoric.
Anti-corruption, Belt and Road, tech surveillance, wolf warrior diplomacy, COVID zero.
Sakoku isolation, internal tensions, Dutch learning, pre-Perry stability.
Perry's arrival, unequal treaties, Meiji Restoration overthrows shogunate.
Rapid industrialization, constitutional monarchy, military victories over China and Russia.
Parliamentary democracy expands, party politics, cultural liberalization, WWI ally.
Manchuria invasion, military dictatorship, Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere, WWII.
American occupation, new constitution, land reform, pacifism, Korean War boom.
Economic miracle, MITI-led development, LDP dominance, US security alliance.
Bubble burst, deflation, political instability, Fukushima. Economic stagnation with social stability.
Abenomics, remilitarization debate, demographic crisis, alliance strengthening.
Mughal decline, East India Company expansion, Battle of Plassey, dual governance.
Direct Crown rule after 1857 Mutiny, railways, English education, early nationalism.
Non-cooperation, civil disobedience, Muslim League, path to partition and independence.
Non-alignment, mixed economy, democratic socialism, IITs, Hindu-Muslim tensions.
Green Revolution, Bangladesh War, Emergency, assassination. Congress party hegemony.
Mandal Commission, Janata experiments, regional parties rise, economic liberalization begins.
Nuclear tests, IT boom, Gujarat riots, India Shining campaign, UPA coalition.
Hindu nationalism, demonetization, GST, CAA-NRC, digital governance, democratic backsliding concerns.
Korean War devastation, Syngman Rhee autocracy, April Revolution, extreme poverty.
Military coup, export-led industrialization, chaebol system, Yushin constitution, assassination.
Gwangju Uprising, democratization movement, 1987 constitution, Olympics.
IMF crisis, Sunshine Policy, tech boom, cultural exports (Hallyu).
Impeachment, MeToo, Moon's engagement, Yoon's conservative turn, demographic crisis.
Dutch East Indies period of Indonesia.
Late Ayutthaya/Early Chakri period of Thailand.
Muhammad Ali Dynasty period of Egypt.
Cape Colony/Early period of South Africa.
Mineral Revolution/Union period of South Africa.
Segregation Era period of South Africa.
Pre-Saudi/First State period of Saudi Arabia.
Second Saudi State/Interregnum period of Saudi Arabia.
Ibn Saud/Unification period of Saudi Arabia.
Oil Kingdom period of Saudi Arabia.
Jewish immigration waves, British Mandate, Arab-Jewish tensions, Holocaust survivors arrive.
Independence, kibbutz socialism, 1967 War, occupation begins. Labor dominance, secular nationalism.
Right turn, Camp David with Egypt, Lebanon War, settlement expansion, Mizrahi empowerment.
Oslo Accords, Rabin assassination, Camp David collapse, Second Intifada.
Permanent right-wing government, settlements, Gaza wars, judicial crisis, Oct 7 and aftermath.
War of Independence period of Algeria.
Italian Occupation/Haile Selassie period of Ethiopia.
